title: CUCUMI 44pcs Mini Glass Bottles with Cork Stoppers, 20ml Capacity, 50 Eye Screws, 30m Twine, Funnels, Perfect for Wedding Favors, Halloween Decorations, Miniature Art, Storage Accessories
description:
About this item
Package contains: 44pcs glass bottles with cork stoppers, including 20pcs 5ml, 12pcs 10ml, 12pcs 20ml, 50 eye screws, a 30-meter twine and 2 funnels.
Dimensions: 5ml bottle: 1.5"x 0.75", 10ml bottle: 1.96"x 0.84", 20ml bottle: 2.5"x 0.8". Duo to manual measurement, please understand slight errors may exist.
Product makings: Made of clean and atoxic glass and wooden stopper. The cork is not easy to drop residue that can be firmly plugged bottle mouth.
Wide Applications: This set can give full play to your imagination, such as necklace, perfume bottle, pendant, potion bottles, message bottles, samples, spell jars, blood vials, wedding gifts, wedding decorations, storage accessories.
Home Decoration: The mini bottles are very cute and multiple purpose, They are often used to miniature art, display, decorate room, garden, bookstore, etc.
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
I got these for potions and spells to make with my kids for Halloween time and they were perfect! Corks sturdy, only one leaked none broken!This set really exceeded my expectations. The packaging was absolutely perfect, nothing was broken, and everything was very neatly placed.I love that there are 3 sizes of bottles, and it also comes with 3 funnels! The twine is great quality and strong, as are the little screws to put on the bottle corks.
Definitely worth way more than the price! I couldn’t be happier!!!Exactly as advertised. 3 different sizes. Perfect for wish/spell jars. Everything was intact and arrived on time. Mini Bic for scale.These can be used for so much because of their quality as well as their different sizes. They are super easy to use and seal good with the hot glue. As arts and crafts is messy, they do not look messy after all the work goes into them.I was going to take a couple photos but to be honest there's not much to be added as they appear true to image. I've used these for a couple different things so far and I absolutely love them. They're easy to work with. I've put the cork about halfway or just over in when I'm in process of filling and need to do other things and it has always been spill safe even when moved from room to room chunked in boxes and then easy enough to open back up when needed! I would definitely recommend!I've bought these twice now and they've been great quality both times. I use them for solid items, so can't speak for how they'd hold liquid. Stoppers fit well. Shipped well, no broken vials.Perfect for tiny hands, this collection of mini bottles will make you feel like a giant when you use them. Each bottle of assorted sizes fit just enough liquid to be completely useless for anything practical, but great to decorate around the house. I filled mine with little potions and poisons for my adventure group and for decoration in my bathroom. Now I get constant compliments on how neat the alchemy shelf is and how giant I have seemingly become. Sometimes before being intimate with a new person, I make sure that the first time they see me nude it is near my shelf of bottles. The optical illusion really helps me out making my partner think I'm much bigger than I really am and boosting my overall confidence. Maybe one day I will find true love? Until then I guess I'll just have to keep sending Christine unsolicited pictures of my bottles.Very useful… Sizes are just right for me…The different sizes of jars are perfect for every need. They are easy to open and close.Perfect for what I'm looking for
reviews_1s:
We’re not the Bottles as far as the size they were supposed to be will not work for my project and I’m now stuck with them as far as my project turned out to be they turned out to be very pointless was very disappointingPlay Video
Glass showered the floor when I first opened this. Very disappointed. The only reason I'm not asking for a refund is because they asked me to mail it back to return it. I'm not spending more of my money that is owed to me to send back a defective item. This was a bs experience. Buy from Etsy. Support small business witches.Kinda bummed they didn't give me the bigger viles since I paid for everything that's supposed to be included but it's okay for now...No hooks were included…. Was trying to make necklaces. Now i need to find Hokies f try I’m craft store… lameThey look mostly great! But a couple of the medium sized vials exploded in transit and now there's tiny glass shards everywhere so I'm afraid to touch the rest of the box! :)The small ones came broken.Crap product and should have known from the price. Arrived and over half were shattered in the packaging due to almost no protection. For what you’re paying you can’t really complain though.Missing the corks on one of the smallest bottles and one of the biggest ones!some of the bottles were broken upon delivery. they were packaged in a foam box, but that was all the padding, the glass jars just rattle against each other.
seriously, these things are not sturdy. especially the big onesGarbage quality
